11.1(1): ma lags so/ /
11.2(1): gshen rab mi bos bka' stsal pa/ yid kyi khye'u chung/ rlung gi khams rig pa'i 
11.3(1): ye shes yin snyam du sems sam/ rlung gi khams ma yin pa gzhan zhig rig pa'i 
11.4(1): ye shes yin snyam du sems sam/ rlung gi khams kyi phyi nas rig pa'i ye shes 'char 
11.5(1): snyam du sems sam/ rlung gi khams kyi nang nas rig pa'i ye shes 'char snyam du 
11.6(1): sems sam/ rig pa'i ye shes la rlung gi khams yod snyam du sems sam/ gsol 
11.7(1): pa/ gshen rab lags/ de ltar ma lags so/ /gshen rab mi bos bka' stsal

11.16(1): khams kyi nang nas rig pa'i ye shes 'char snyam du sems sam/ rig pa'i ye shes 
11.17(1): la chu'i khams yod snyam du sems sam/ gsol pa/ gshen rab lags/ de ltar ma

15.11(1): nang nas shar ba yang ma yin/ gnyis ka'i bar nas shar ba yang ma yin/ nam

180.3(1): pa lags/ dug gsum dug lnga yis gting phul bgyi ba ci lta bu lags/ gshen rab 
180.4(1): kyis bka' stsal pa/ 'di lta ste/ dug gsum zhes bya ba ni/ lus las byung pa'i nyon 
180.5(1): mongs pa dang/ ngag las byung ba'i nyon mongs pa dang/ yid las byung ba'i nyon 
180.6(1): mongs pa dang gsum mo/ /dug lnga zhes bya ba ni/ zhe sdang dang/ 'dod chags dang/
180.7(1): gti mug dang/ nga rgyal dang/ phrag dog dang lnga'o/ /gting phul zhes bya ba ni/ lus 
180.8(1): kyi nyon mongs pas 'khor ba la gzhen 'debs pa dang/ ngag gi nyon mongs pas 
180.9(1): 'khor ba la gzhen 'debs pa dang/ yid kyi nyon mongs pas 'khor ba la gzhen 
180.10(1): 'debs pa dang/ zhe sdang gis 'khor ba la gzhan 'debs pa dang/ 'dod chags 
180.11(1): kyis 'khor ba la gzhen 'debs pa dang/ gti mug gis 'khor ba la gzhen 'debs 
180.12(1): pa dang/ nga rgyal gyis 'khor ba la gzhen 'debs pa dang/ phrag dog gis 'khor ba 
180.13(1): la gzhen 'debs pa'o/ /yid kyi khye'u chung gis gsol pa/ ston pa lags/ 'byung 
180.14(1): ba lnga yis rgyu bskyed ces bya ba ci lta bu lags/ gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/
180.15(1): 'byung ba zhes bya ba ni/ rlung gi 'byung ba dang/ me'i 'byung ba dang/ chu'i 'byung ba 
180.16(1): dang/ sa'i 'byung ba dang/ nam mkha'i 'byung ba'o/ /rgyu bskyed ces bya ba ni/ rlung 
180.17(1): gis dbugs kyi rgyu bskyed pa dang/ mes drod kyi rgyu bskyed pa dang/ chus khrag gi 
180.18(1): rgyu bskyed pa dang/ sas sha'i rgyu bskyed pa dang/ nam mkhas rnam par shes pa'i rgyu 
180.19(1): bskyed pa'o/ /de nas g.yung drung gtsug gshen rgyal bas gsol pa/ ston pa lags/
180.20(1): sems can thams cad khams gsum du 'khor zhing/ rgyu drug tu ltung zhes bya ba ci 
180.21(1): ltar lags/ gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ 'di lta ste/ sems can thams cad 
181.1(1): ces bya ba ni/ phyi snod 'jig rten gyis bsdus pa gar khyab pa tsam zhig /nang bcud 
181.2(1): kyis bsdus pa'i sems can gyis khyab ste/ skye 'gro srog gis bsdus pa thams cad la 
181.3(1): bya'o//khams gsum du 'khor zhes bya ba ni/gzugs med pa'i khams na 'khor ba 
181.4(1): dang/ gzugs khams na 'khor ba dang/ 'dod khams na 'khor ba'o/ /rgyu drug tu 
181.5(1): ltung zhes bya ba ni/ lan gcig phyir mi ldog pa'i sa ma gnon gyi bar du lha ru ltung 
181.6(1): ba dang/ lha las lha ma yin du ltung ba dang/ lha ma yin las mi ru ltung ba dang/ mi 
181.7(1): las byol song du ltung ba dang/ byol song las yid dwags su ltung ba dang/ yi dwags 
181.8(1): nas dmyal bar ltung ba'o/ /g.yung drung gtsug gshen rgyal bas gsol pa/ ston pa 
181.9(1): lags/ sems can 'khor ba dang mya ngan gnas pa rnams/ kha lo sgyur zhing 'bras 
181.10(1): bu thob par bya ba'i thabs shig bshad du gsol lo/ /gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/
181.11(1): sems can thams cad 'khor ba dang mya ngan la gnas te/ dper na zo chu'i brgyud 
181.12(1): ma'am/ shing rta'i 'phang lo ltar/ gcig nas gcig tu 'khor ro/ /sdug bsngal zung 
181.13(1): bzhi ya brgyad kyis mya ngan las thar pa'i dus med pas/ 'khor ba dang mya ngan las 
181.14(1): gnas pa'o/ /kha lo bsgyur zhes bya ba ni/ dper na rta kha tshar ma la skyes bu yang rtsal 
181.15(1): can gyis bskyod nas thul ba dang/ ci ltar bsgyur bzhin du btul ba dang 'dra ste/
181.16(1): sems can nyon mongs pa shas che ba rnams bden pa'i don 'di bstan cing sbyangs 
181.17(1): pas/ sems can rnams dge ba la yid phyogs shing mos pa'i ting nge 'dzin dang 
181.18(1): ldan par 'gyur ba'o/ /'bras bu thob pa zhes bya ba ni/ sems can rnams bla na med 
181.19(1): pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i 'bras bu thob pa la bya'o/ /
181.20(1): 7 de nas ston pa gshen rab mi bo la/ gshen rab g.yung drung gtsug gshen 
181.21(1): rgyal ba dang/ gzhan yang 'khor du gtogs pa'i g.yung drung sems dpa' rnams

244.7(1): pa nyid 'gyur ba med pa g.yung drung gi don du gcig pa'o/ /rigs kyi bu/ 'gyur 
244.8(1): ba med pa'i sku la rnam par rtog pa 'khrul pa'i blo med do/ /'gyur ba med pa'i sku 
244.9(1): rnam par rtog pa 'khrul pa'i blo med pa la dpyod cig /'gyur ba med pa'i sku rnam 
244.10(1): par rtog pa 'khrul pa'i blo med pa la dpyod cing mthong ba na/ 'byams yas pa 
244.11(1): g.yung drung gi dbyings su 'byams yas pa gsal ba ye shes kyi 'bras bu thob par 
244.12(1): 'gyur ro/ /'gyur ba med pa'i sku dang 'byams yas pa gsal ba ye shes kyi 'bras 
244.13(1): bu gnyis su med do/ /gnyis su byar med de mnyam pa nyid 'gyur ba med pa g.yung 
244.14(1): drung gi don du gcig pa'o/ /rigs kyi bu/ rang bzhin med pa'i gsung la rnam par 
244.15(1): rtog pa 'khrul pa'i blo med do/ /rang bzhin med pa'i gsung rnam par rtog pa 'khrul 
244.16(1): pa'i blo med pa la dpyod cig /rang bzhin med pa'i gsung rnam par rtog pa 'khrul 
244.17(1): pa'i blo med pa la dpyod cing mthong ba na/ 'byams yas pa g.yung drung gi dbyings 
244.18(1): su 'byams yas pa gsal ba ye shes kyi 'bras bu thob par 'gyur ro/ /rang bzhin 
244.19(1): med pa'i gsung dang 'byams yas pa gsal ba ye shes kyi 'bras bu gnyis su med 
244.20(1): do/ /gnyis su byar med de mnyam pa nyid 'gyur ba med pa g.yung drung gi don du 
244.21(1): gcig pa'o/ /rigs kyi bu/ mnyam nyid 'khrul pa med pa'i thugs la rnam par rtog 
245.1(1): pa 'khrul pa'i blo med do/ /mnyam nyid 'khrul pa med pa'i thugs rnam par rtog pa 
245.2(1): 'khrul pa'i blo med pa la dpyod cig /mnyam nyid 'khrul pa med pa'i thugs rnam 
245.3(1): par rtog pa 'khrul pa'i blo med pa la dpyod cing mthong ba na/ 'byams yas pa 
245.4(1): g.yung drung gi dbyings su 'byams yas pa gsal ba ye shes kyi 'bras bu thob par 
245.5(1): 'gyur ro/ /mnyam nyid 'khrul pa med pa'i thugs dang 'byams yas pa gsal ba 
245.6(1): ye shes kyi 'bras bu gnyis su med do/ /gnyis su byar med de mnyam pa nyid 'gyur 
245.7(1): ba med pa g.yung drung gi don du gcig pa'o/ /rigs kyi bu/ rnam pa thams cad 
245.8(1): mkhyen pa'i ye shes la rnam par rtog pa 'khrul pa'i blo med do/ /rnam pa thams cad 
245.9(1): mkhyen pa'i ye shes rnam par rtog pa 'khrul pa'i blo med pa la dpyod cig /rnam pa 
245.10(1): thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes rnam par rtog pa 'khrul pa'i blo med pa la dpyod cing 
245.11(1): mthong ba na/ 'byams yas pa g.yung drung gi dbyings su 'byams yas pa gsal ba 
245.12(1): ye shes kyi 'bras bu thob par 'gyur ro/ /rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes dang 
245.13(1): 'byams yas pa gsal ba ye shes kyi 'bras bu gnyis su med do/ /gnyis su byar 
245.14(1): med de mnyam pa nyid 'gyur ba med pa g.yung drung gi don du gcig pa'o/ /rigs 
245.15(1): kyi bu/ bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i 'bras bu la rnam par rtog pa 'khrul 
245.16(1): pa'i blo med do/ /bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i 'bras bu rnam par rtog pa 
245.17(1): 'khrul pa'i blo med pa la dpyod cig /bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i 'bras 
245.18(1): bu rnam par rtog pa 'khrul pa'i blo med pa la dpyod cing mthong ba na/ 'byams yas 
245.19(1): pa g.yung drung gi dbyings su 'byams yas pa gsal ba ye shes kyi 'bras bu thob par 
245.20(1): 'gyur ro/ /bla na med pa yang dag par rdzogs pa'i 'bras bu dang 'byams yas pa 
245.21(1): gsal ba ye shes kyi 'bras bu gnyis su med do/ /gnyis su byar med de mnyam pa

246.2(1): de nas g.yung drung gtsug gshen rgyal ba yis gsol pa/ ston pa lags/ yid 
246.3(1): kyi bslu ba 'khrul pa'i blo ni ci ltar spang bar bgyi/ yongs su rgya ma chad par gsal 
246.4(1): ba ye shes kyi 'bras bu ni ci ltar thob par bgyi/ gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/
246.5(1): legs so legs so/ /rigs kyi bu 'di lta ste/ gzugs yid kyis bslu ba 'khrul

551.3(1): rgyas pa'i phyir/ rdzu 'phrul gyi rkang pa thams cad 'bri ba'i mu med par ye nas sangs

551.5(1): pa'i phyir/ rdzu 'phrul gyi rkang pa thams cad sngon gyi mu med par ye nas sangs rgyas

570.2(1): med pa g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ lhun gyis 
570.3(1): grub pa'i 'phrin las thams cad sngon gyi mu med par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /da 
570.4(1): lta'i mu med pa g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/
570.5(1): lhun gyis grub pa'i 'phrin las thams cad da lta'i mu med par ye nas sangs rgyas 
570.6(1): pa'o/ /phyi ma'i mu med pa g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i 
570.7(1): phyir/ lhun gyis grub pa'i 'phrin las thams cad phyi ma'i mu med par ye nas sangs 
570.8(1): rgyas pa'o/ /rigs kyi bu 'di lta ste/ mu med pa g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad ye 
570.9(1): nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ rnam par dag pa'i spyod pa thams cad mu med par ye 
570.10(1): nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /rang bzhin mu med pa g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad ye 
570.11(1): nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ rnam par dag pa'i spyod pa thams cad rang bzhin mu 
570.12(1): med par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o//skye ba'i mu med pa g.yung drung gi dbyings thams 
570.13(1): cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ rnam par dag pa'i spyod pa thams cad skye ba'i mu 
570.14(1): med par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /'phel ba'i mu med pa g.yung drung gi dbyings 
570.15(1): thams cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ rnam par dag pa'i spyod pa thams cad 
570.16(1): 'phel ba'i mu med par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /'gag pa'i mu med pa g.yung drung 
570.17(1): gi dbyings thams cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ rnam par dag pa'i spyod pa 
570.18(1): thams cad 'gag pa'i mu med par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /'bri ba'i mu med pa 
570.19(1): g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ rnam par dag pa'i 
570.20(1): spyod pa thams cad 'bri ba'i mu med par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /sngon gyi mu med 
570.21(1): pa g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ rnam par dag

571.12(1): ba'i mu med par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /'phel ba'i mu med pa g.yung drung gi 
571.13(1): dbyings thams cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ legs par 'byung ba'i yon tan 
571.14(1): thams cad 'phel ba'i mu med par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /'gag pa'i mu med pa

577.21(1):       7 de nas ston pa gshen rab mi bo yis/ 'khor du gtogs pa'i g.yung drung 
578.1(1): sems dpa' rnams la 'di skad ces bka' stsal to/ /g.yung drung gtsug gshen 
578.2(1): rgyal ba/ gzhan yang gshen rab g.yung drung sems dpa' sems dpa' chen po 
578.3(1): rigs kyi bu/bon thams cad 'byams yas pa g.yung drung gi dbyings su sangs 
578.4(1): rgyas par bshad kyi nyon cig/'byams yas pa g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad 
578.5(1): ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ sems kyi rang bzhin ye shes kyi 'bras bu thob pa 
578.6(1): thams cad 'byams yas pa ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /de nas g.yung drung gtsug 
578.7(1): gshen rgyal bas gsol pa/ ston pa lags/ 'byams yas pa g.yung drung gi dbyings 
578.8(1): thams cad ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ sems kyi rang bzhin ye shes kyi 'bras bu 
578.9(1): thob pa thams cad 'byams yas par ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /zhes bya ba ci lta bu 
578.10(1): lags/ gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ legs so legs so/ /rigs kyi bu 'di lta 
578.11(1): ste/ bon g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad 'byams yas te ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i 
578.12(1): phyir/ gzugs sems kyi rang bzhin ye shes kyi 'bras bu thob pa thams cad 'byams 
578.13(1): yas te ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /bon g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad rang 
578.14(1): bzhin 'byams yas te ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ gzugs sems kyi rang bzhin 
578.15(1): ye shes kyi 'bras bu thob pa thams cad rang bzhin 'byams yas te ye nas sangs 
578.16(1): rgyas pa'o/ /bon g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad dpag tshad med par 'byams 
578.17(1): yas te ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ gzugs sems kyi rang bzhin ye shes kyi 
578.18(1): 'bras bu thob pa thams cad dpag tshad med par 'byams yas te ye nas sangs 
578.19(1): rgyas pa'o/ /bon g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad dngos po med par 'byams yas 
578.20(1): te ye nas sangs rgyas pa'i phyir/ gzugs sems kyi rang bzhin ye shes kyi 'bras bu 
578.21(1): thob pa thams cad dngos po med par 'byams yas te ye nas sangs rgyas pa'o/ /

579.10(1): g.yung drung gi dbyings thams cad gtang bral med par 'byams yas te ye nas

638.21(1): lugs kyis rjes su gzigs mkhan rnam pas 'di la dge skyon thad yo bsrang yong

639.2(1): gi bstan pa rin po che gsal dag 'grig po'i zhabs zhu'i grabs bsdogs tsam du 
639.3(1): 'gyur snyam che ba bcas/ 'byung ldan 301 rab byung 1      7 bod shing lug lo'i zla 
639.4(1): tshes 11 nyin/ spyi lo 2015 5 29 nyin/
639.5(1): khyung po steng chen dgon sgo mdzod dpe zhus tshan pas/
641.1(1): bsgrigs rjes kyi gtam/
641.2(1): ri mtho sa gtsang gangs kyis mdzes pa'i zhang bod yul lung gi dkyil snying byas pa'i 
641.3(1): lho rgyal 'dzam gling 'di ru ches thog ma'i 'phrul yig gi sgron me spar te rig pa'i gnas [)]
641.4(1): dang bstan pa'i bon gyis 'gro ba'i sdug bsngal dang rmongs pa'i mun pa sel bar 
641.5(1): mdzad pa'i ston pa bka' drin can mnyam med 7 gshen rab mi bo mchog dang / ston pa 
641.6(1): mchog gi bka' la rang dbang gis dgongs 'grel bka' brten brtsams pa'i rgyal tshab 
641.7(1): dam pa mu cho ldem drug dang / 'dzam gling mkhas pa'i rgyan drug sogs g.yung drung bon 
641.8(1): gyi bstan 'dzin gser ri'i 'phreng ba'i bka' drin dang / las bsod mar 'grib kyi log 
641.9(1): lta'i bar chod sogs bstan la 'tshe ba'i rkyen ngan rnams la mel tshe bya ra mdzad pa'i mi 
641.10(1): mngon bstan skyong lha dang srung ma'i sdong grogs bcas la brten nas/ zhang bod mes 
641.11(1): po'i lo rgyus dang 'brel ba'i 'od stong 'bar ba'i thun min lta grub ste/ brtan g.yo'i 
641.12(1): rgud pa gso zhing phan bde'i legs tshogs 'byung ba'i gnas dam pa lung rtogs gnyis 
641.13(1): kyis bsdus pa'i sangs rgyas g.yung drung bon gyi bstan pa rin po che 'di nyid de ring gi 
641.14(1): 'dzam bu gling pa'i spyi dpal du bzhugs thub pa byung yod/
641.15(1): de yang bon gyi rig gzhung dang lo rgyus la sogs su bltas tshe da lta dngos su mjal 
641.16(1): du yod pa'i bon gyi grangs tshan ni spyir bon gyi gzhung lugs kyi bcu cha tsam yin pa'i 
641.17(1): tshod du snang la/ de'ang zhang bod lo rgyus kyi 'pho 'gyur ring mo'i khrod kyi mi rigs zhig gi 
641.18(1): yon tshad dang / chab srid pa 'ga'i g.yo byus dang / rgyal khab cig gi dar rgud bcas 
641.19(1): dang 'brel ba las/ las dbang gi skos thang kho na la khag 'gel byed sa ci la yod/
641.20(1): zhang bod mes po'i lo rgyus dang 'brel ba'i sangs rgyas g.yung drung bon gyi grub mtha'i ngo 
642.1(1): bo gang yin pa dang /rig pa'i gzhung lugs la grangs tshan du tsam yod pa/ lo rgyus kyi 
642.2(1): 'phel rim khrod nyams gud ga tshod 'phrad pa/ bon skyong mi sna tshos dka' ngal gdong 
642.3(1): len gyi bzod bsran ji tsam bskyed pa shes rtogs byed rgyu ni/ de ring gi bon rig pa 
642.4(1): ba'am bon bstan 'dzin skyong spel gsum gyi las la zhugs pa'i rjes rabs pa yongs kyi 
642.5(1): khur 'gan du gyur/
642.6(1): nged khyung po steng chen dgon g.yung drung bstan rgyas gling nas kyang rang nus gang 
642.7(1): yod kyis bon gyi bstan pa rin po che 'dzin skyong spel gsum byed bzhin yod pa'i khongs 
642.8(1): nas/ bstan dang 'gro ba'i don la gzigs pa yangs pa'i 7mkhan rin po che 'od zer 
642.9(1): sbyin pa phun tshogs mchog gis sngar song bon gyi lo rgyus dang / da lta'i bon gyi gnas 
642.10(1): bab/ ma 'ongs bon gyi dgos mkho sogs la lhag bsam cher bzhes kyis/ spyi lo 2006
642.11(1): lo nas bzung ste [{]g.yung drung bon gyi bka' brten dpe rnying phyogs bsgrigs khang[}]zhes 
642.12(1): pa btsug ste/ gna' dpe 'tshol bsdu/ gtsang bshus gtan 'beb/ dag zhus las rim 
642.13(1): sogs la 'jug ste/ bka' dang bka' brten gsung 'bum bcas glegs bam brgya phrag 
642.14(1): du ma gsal dag khams gtsang spus tshad ldan pa dpar skrun 'grems spel dang / bon 
642.15(1): sbyin kyang 'bor chen byas nas g.yung drung bon gyi bstan pa dar spel thad grub 'bras 
642.16(1): 'bur du thon pa'i sri zhu bsgrubs yod la/ rgyal phyi nang du bzhugs pa'i bla ma dge bshes 
642.17(1): dad ldan skya ser du mas bsngags brjod kyi me tog kyang mang du 'thor song bas nged 
642.18(1): tsho'i ngos nas kyang da res las don chen po 'grub pa'i gdeng spobs dang dad gus lhag 
642.19(1): bsam bcas sngar las lhag par 'phel song / rig pa'i gnas dang bstan pa'i bon 
642.20(1): gyis phyug pa'i phyi mo g.yung drung bon gyi gzhung lugs la grub mtha' 'dzin pa mi chen bla 
642.21(1): chen 'gas gcig rjes gnyis 'jug gis bsam bzhin du brda chad khag log 'grel 
642.22(1): byas te rjes 'dzin rnams mgo rmongs su bcug pa mthong / 'di dag ni rgyal khab dang mi 
643.1(1): rigs/chos lugs bcas gang la yang mthun sgril dang bde skyid kyi bkag rdo ru 'gyur 
643.2(1): gshis/ 'dir bon gyi gzhung lugs ngo ma shes 'dod na bon gyi gsung rab dpe cha 'di 
643.3(1): lta bu la blta klog dang zhib 'jug gnang re'i ched dang / g.yung drung bon gyi bla sprul 
643.4(1): mkhas dbang mang pos yun ring re bskul byas pa'i rkyen dang / rgya che'i bod yig klog 
643.5(1): pa po yongs la blta bde 'khyer sla'i cha rkyen du dmigs nas/ ston pa'i gsung rab lung 
643.6(1): gi bon rin po che'i skor deb phreng brgya dang lnga bcu can zhig yig dkar gyi lam nas 
643.7(1): legs bsgrigs byas te/ rje smra seng bla ma'i gsung gi byin rlabs las 'phos pa/ g.yung 
643.8(1): drung bon gyi rgyud gzhung rin po che'i khrod kyi thun mong min pa'i brda chad/[ <<]gsung rab 
643.9(1): sgo mdzod rin po che'i glegs bam[>>]zhes pa dpe tshogs spyi chings kyi mtshan du gsol nas 
643.10(1): dpar 'grems zhus pa yin/
643.11(1): zhus dag thad las rim dngos la thog ma'i ma dpe gang la byas pa/ bar du dpe cha 
643.12(1): gang du bsdur ba/ bsdur ba'i legs cha gang zhig thon pa sogs glegs bam so so'i nang 
643.13(1): dang mjug gi zhus bsgrigs gsal bshad du bris yod/ mdor na nged las mi yongs 
643.14(1): kyis spyi lo 2 11lo nas bzung mi lo lnga yi ring dad pa dag snang dang rang gi dge sbyor 
643.15(1): dang bstan la zhabs phyi gtso bzung thog deb rer tshar grangs bco lnga nas nyi shu bar 
643.16(1): zhus dag byas yod pas sngar las lhag pa'i legs cha zhig thon yod pa'i re ba yod/ 'on 
643.17(1): kyang re 'ga' ma dpe gcig ma gtogs bsdur ya ma rnyed pa dang / re 'ga' bsdur ya 
643.18(1): du ma rnyed kyang bris pa'i chad lhag sogs kyis gcig mtshungs med pa dang / nged zhus 
643.19(1): sgrig pa tsho'i mkhyen dpyod tshad brgal can min pa bcas dang rjes 'gro byas pas nor 
643.20(1): 'khrul gyis bslad pa'ang yod nges pas/ rjes gzigs mkhan rnam pas su dang gang la 
643.21(1): khag dkri med pa rang bstan rang skyong gi 'gan 'khri gtsang ma phrag tu khur ste bstan pa 
643.22(1): rin po che'i ched du nor 'khrul yo bsrang dag ther gnang ba'i skul ma zhu rgyu dang /
644.1(1): mthar don du nged [<<]g.yung drung bon gyi bka' brten dpe rnying phyogs bsgrigs khang [>>]
644.2(1): gis las don rlabs chen 'di 'dra zhig legs grub byung ba ni/ rig gzhung 'di dang 
644.3(1): bstan pa 'di la lhag bsam can gyis phyar gru mnyam 'degs byas pa las byung ba 
644.4(1): yin/ kan su'u mi rigs dpe skrun khang gi dbu khrid 'brug rgyal mkhar dang gcod pa 
644.5(1): rnam gnyis nas thugs khur rgyab skyor tshad med gnang ba dang / lhag par du dus rab 
644.6(1): kyi gnyan 'phrang mang po'i nang tshe srog 'ben dang bsdos te srung skyong byas pa'i dpe cha 
644.7(1): g.yar ba'i dpe bdag rnam pa dang / de bzhin nga tsho'i bstan don gyi bya ba kun la 
644.8(1): mthun sbyor gnang ba ma tshad dpe tshogs 'di dpar skrun skabs su yang ma bskul dang 
644.9(1): blang gis zhal 'debs gnang mkhan bcas dngos shugs brgyud gsum nas rgyu tshegs 
644.10(1): thabs gsum gyis sdong grogs rogs ram gnang mkhan yongs la snying dbus nas 
644.11(1): thugs rje che zhu rgyu dang / gsung rab dag bzhengs byas pa'i dge ba'i tshogs 'dis /
644.12(1):       7 skyabs rje rgyal ba sman ri ba'i mkhan slob rnam gnyis gtsos ris su ma chad pa'i 
644.13(1): bstan 'dzin skyes chen dam pa rnams kyi sku tshe bskal brgyar brtan zhing bzhed dgongs 
644.14(1): lhun gyis 'grub pa dang / 'brel thogs kyi sbyin pa'i bdag po dang las gzhi 'di'i byed 
644.15(1): po kun tshe bsod dbang khams gong nas gong du mtho ste myur du sku gsum rdzogs pa'i 
644.16(1): sangs rgyas kyi go 'phang thob pa dang / zhang bod rig gzhung rnams mi nyams gong nas 
644.17(1): gong du 'phel te 'dzam gling tha gru yongs kyi snod bcud rgud pa gso zhing phan bde'i 
644.18(1): gsos su khyab pa dang / yangs pa'i rgyal khams kun du nad mug 'khrug rtsod dang rang 
644.19(1): byung 'byung ba'i 'jigs pa rnams rmeng med du zhi nas bde legs phun tshogs skyid kyi nyi
